headline: New App 'Roommate Translator' Converts Passive-Aggressive Notes Into Actual Communication
summary: The app deciphers messages like 'It would be nice if someone could wash their dishes' into 'WASH YOUR DISHES OR DIE.'
fullBody: Living situation peace advocate Dr. Healthy Conflict has released the 'Roommate Translator' app, which deciphers passive-aggressive roommate notes into actual meaning. The app uses AI to analyze messages and provide translations. Example: The note 'It would be nice if someone could occasionally wash their dishes ' translates to 'WASH YOUR DISHES OR I'LL HIDE YOUR STUFF AND MAKE IT LOOK LIKE A JOKE.' Another message, 'I don't mind if you use my things, really ' translates to 'IF YOU TOUCH MY STUFF I WILL END YOU.' The app also suggests responses that are 'firm but not relationship-ending.' One user said, 'I used this app and finally understood that my roommate's smiley face meant -I'm going to poison your food. It saved my life.' The app has been downloaded 5 million times and is credited with reducing roommate murders by 47%.
imagePrompt: Phone screen showing passive aggressive note being translated to angry message, person looking relieved, dishes in background, comic illustration, flat design, purple and gray colors
